title: Nevanlinna Second Main Theorem and tautological inequality for parabolic manifolds
summary: We obtain a Second Main Theorem type inequality for holomorphic maps $f : M \to X$, where $M$ is a parabolic manifold and $X$ is smooth projective with dim $M$ $\le$ dim $X$. We also derive a parabolic Tautological inequality for smooth logarithmic pairs.
